title: DDI-CDI Machine
description: DDI-CDI Machine agent (cls-Machine, extends Agent). Represents software or hardware with access location, function, and interface specifications.

cdi:accessLocation.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:accessLocation.description: Network or physical access point for this machine

anyOf.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
anyOf.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

items.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
items.description: Shared DDI-CDI structured data types from DDICDILibrary/DataTypes. Provides reusable $defs for identifiers, names, contact information, references, and other common DDI-CDI structured data types.

cdi:ownerOperatorContact.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:ownerOperatorContact.description: Contact information for the owner or operator

cdi:purpose.title: DDI-CDI Data Types
cdi:purpose.description: Purpose or role of this agent
